title: Chytraculia concinna
taxonomy: Chytraculia concinna is a species of plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to southern Africa, specifically in the regions of South Africa and possibly Namibia. The classification of Chytraculia concinna is as follows: it is a member of the tribe Gnaphalieae and the subfamily Asteroideae. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and phylogenetic relationships. Further research may provide more accurate and detailed information about Chytraculia concinna's classification.
